news.headline: Emmanuel Grégoire elected Paris mayor, succeeding fellow left-winger Anne Hidalgo
news.summary: Socialist frontrunner Emmanuel Grégoire comfortably defeated veteran conservative Rachida Dati in a second-round runoff for Paris mayor on Sunday, defying forecasts of a close race to extend the left's quarter-century rule in the French capital.

news.headline: Socialist incumbent defeats far-right challenger in key Marseille mayoral election
news.summary: Left-wing incumbent Benoît Payan was comfortably re-elected mayor of France's second city Marseille on Sunday, holding off a challenge from far-right candidate Franck Allisio, projections from several pollsters showed.

news.headline: Israel Orders Military to Intensify Demolitions in Southern Lebanon
news.summary: Israel Katz, the defense minister, said he ordered troops to destroy more bridges and buildings in southern Lebanon, stoking worries that Israel was widening a military-controlled buffer zone there.

news.headline: Strait of Hormuz: Trump’s ultimatum to Iran
news.summary: Donald #Trump issued an ultimatum to #Iran on March 22: 48 hours to reopen the Strait of #Hormuz or the #US will strike Iranian oil facilities. Tehran has responded, warning it would retaliate.
